name: PEARL Diode Laser
shortDescription: Compact, 12 kg portable diode laser with 4 wavelengths. 500W power, -5°C cooling, 280-gram ultra-light handpiece. Ideal for mobile services and beginner beauticians.
description: The Pearl is a compact, lightweight yet powerful diode laser hair removal device that offers the most advanced technology for all skin types. The four integrated wavelengths (755, 808, 940, 1064 nm) enable precise and effective treatment for all hair types. Its lightweight design and intelligent interface make it a perfect choice for both beginner and advanced beauticians.
metaDescription: Pearl compact diode laser with 4 wavelengths (755, 808, 940, 1064 nm). 500W, 12 kg, -5°C cooling, skin rejuvenation mode. Ideal for beginners. 2-year warranty.

videoDescription.headline: PEARL – Compact diode laser with professional results
paragraphs: The Pearl is a compact, lightweight yet powerful diode laser that offers the most advanced technology for all skin types.
A perfect choice for beginner and advanced beauticians, mobile service providers, or salons with an expanding service portfolio.

afterVideo.text: Have questions about the Pearl? We're happy to help!

afterFeatures.headline: Would you like to see the Pearl in person?
afterFeatures.subtitle: Visit our showroom in Érd and try it out in person!

final.headline: Interested in the PEARL diode laser?
final.subtitle: Request a free consultation and we'll help you decide if this is the best choice for you.

featureRows.headline: Why choose the Pearl?
featureRows.subtitle: Lightweight, portable, yet professional – the best entry into the world of diode laser hair removal.

features.title: 4 wavelengths – for all skin types and hair colors
features.description:
The four integrated wavelengths enable precise and effective treatment for all hair types.

Wavelengths:

755 nm – light, fine hair (phototype I–III)
808 nm – deep follicles, dense hair
940 nm – inhibiting follicle regeneration
1064 nm – dark skin types (IV–VI), deep penetration

features.title: Compact and lightweight – 12 kg, 280 g handpiece
features.description:
The Pearl weighs only 12 kg total, and the 280-gram ergonomic handpiece ensures comfortable use even during long treatments. The 12×15 mm spot size provides efficient body surface coverage.
12 kg total device weight – easy to move
280 g ergonomic handpiece
12×15 mm spot size
features.highlight: Ideal for mobile services and smaller salons.

features.title: Quad cooling system – painless treatment
features.description: The Pearl's quad cooling system (semiconductor + fan + sapphire + TEC) maintains the handpiece temperature between -5°C and +5°C, making the treatment pleasant and painless for clients.

features.title: Three treatment modes – from beginner to pro
features.description:
The Pearl offers three treatment modes for different experience levels.
HR Preset – automatic parameter setting by skin type
HR Professional – freely adjustable fluence (0–60 J/cm²)
Skin rejuvenation mode – tightening, pore reduction, tone improvement

features.title: Treatment areas – hair removal and skin rejuvenation
features.description:
The Pearl is suitable not only for permanent hair removal but also for skin rejuvenation treatments on all skin types (I–VI).

Treatable areas:

Legs, arms, back, chest
Underarms, intimate area
Face, chin, lip, mustache
Skin rejuvenation (tightening, tone improvement)

training.headline: Device operator training – within official adult education
training.intro: Professional device operator training is available for the Pearl diode laser, provided within an officially registered adult education program. The training aims to provide participants with comprehensive theoretical and practical knowledge for the professional and safe use of the device.
items: Operating principles and safety aspects of diode laser technology
Setting Pearl treatment parameters by skin and hair type
Application of HR Preset and HR Professional modes
Practical treatments on models – on different body areas
Contraindications, client selection and pre-treatment protocols
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can learn treatment techniques in a real-world setting.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official FAR certificate confirming competence for the professional operation of the device.

testimonials.name: Molnár Vivien
testimonials.text: My first diode laser and <mark>I'm very satisfied with the Pearl</mark>. The HR Preset mode helps a lot because it automatically sets the parameters. Lightweight, small, and my clients love the results.

testimonials.name: Lakatos Fruzsina
testimonials.text: As a mobile beautician, I was looking for an easily transportable device. <mark>The Pearl at 12 kilos is perfect</mark>, and the 4 wavelengths work everywhere. The skin rejuvenation mode has also become a big favorite among my clients.

testimonials.name: Beauty Point Szombathely
testimonials.text: Excellent value for money! <mark>The Pearl delivers the same 4 wavelengths as more expensive devices</mark>, and the cooling is perfect too. Ideal as a second device for the salon.

expertQuote.quote: The Pearl is an ideal choice for those who want to offer professional diode laser hair removal at an affordable price. The 4 wavelengths, compact size and skin rejuvenation function make it an excellent entry-level device.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

functionCards.description: Quad cooling system for comfortable treatments.

functionCards.name: Intelligent modes
functionCards.description: HR Preset and Professional operating modes.

faq.question: What is the difference between the Pearl and the Black Pearl?
faq.answer: The Pearl and the Black Pearl have identical technical specifications (500W, 4 wavelengths, 12 kg, -5°C cooling). The difference is in appearance – the Pearl is white, the Black Pearl is in black finish.

faq.question: Is it suitable for beginners?
faq.answer: Yes! The HR Preset mode automatically sets the parameters based on skin type, hair color and density, so even beginner beauticians can work safely with it.

faq.question: What treatment modes are available?
faq.answer: Three modes: HR Preset (automatic, for beginners), HR Professional (freely adjustable fluence 0–60 J/cm², frequency 1–10 Hz), and skin rejuvenation mode (tightening, pore reduction).

faq.question: How quickly does it pay for itself?
faq.answer: On average within 2-3 months, with 4-6 clients per day. Use our ROI calculator on the page for exact calculations!

faq.question: What warranty do I get?
faq.answer: We provide a 2-year comprehensive warranty. We have our own service background, and we provide a replacement device during repairs.

faq.question: Is it suitable for mobile services?
faq.answer: Yes! The Pearl weighs only 12 kg, is easily transportable, and operates on 220V/50Hz or 110V/60Hz power supply.
